SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-16-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-16-2025 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: ALLYSYN OVERTON. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ANIYAH GRANT. DEFENDANT DAVID SAMMONS IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-16-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GRANT, ANIYAH RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SAMMONS, DAVID $365.50 PRINCIPAL, $30.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $395.50, TO BE PAID ON OR BEFORE MARCH 16, 2025. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
